title: 181  Srila Prabhupada claims that he is the representative of God
speaker: HDG Srila Prabhupada

segments.text: There was one conversation, one devotee came to Prabhupada and he said,
They are telling me that you are going to see the representative of God.
And when I came to that vision, I saw the person.
At that time, I didn't know who was he.
But I had some doubts in my mind and I was thinking, Oh, that's probably another kind of propaganda.
This was all in the dream.
But when I came to that person sitting on the elevated seat in that forest, surrounded by many, many devotees,
that person looked at me and proved to me that he was representative of God.
So this person, devotee, was telling that I had a dream.
And in the dream, there was a representative of God surrounded by many, many devotees.
And he looked at me and proved that he was representative of God.
But after that, I forgot.
Maybe one year or something like that, one or two years after.
Prabhupada, then Prabhupada replies,
So there is no doubt about it that I am the representative of God.
So this devotee is saying, I had a dream, representative of God was there, many devotees were there.
So Prabhupada says, there is no doubt about it that I am the representative of God.
The devotee says, Yes, but when I was.
Prabhupada, either you dream or not dream, I claim that I am representative.
Because I had a dream and some person was there, something similar to you.
So therefore, you are a representative of God.
Prabhupada says, whether you dream or you don't dream, I am claiming that I am representative of God.
Prabhupada says, Yes, but this thing was just confirming.
When I saw you the first time in Amsterdam, you were the same person that I saw in my dream one or two years previously.
Prabhupada says, You have read Chaitanya Charita Amrita, Guru Tattva.
So there is clearly said that Guru is the manifestation of God.
So it is confirmed.
So it is confirmed in the Shastra and all the Acharyas accept it.
Yasya Prasadat Bhagwat Prasad.
